":[{"text":"技能提升：触发【反制】的次数减少至"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"次"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：附加【禁止治疗】概率增加至"},{"text":"100%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+10%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：战斗开始时,水月真立即获得"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合【反制】"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.e8d7896844901","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(20)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(20)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"" lor":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：驱散增益效果数量增加至"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"个"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：效果命中"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：自身防御附加伤害比例增加至"},{"text":"360%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：效果命中"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：技能冷却减少"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"1","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":60,"height":60}}]}},{"key":"0.8c3da41c4d01f","type":"upgrade-info","data":{"title":"潜能","isShowTabs":false,"tabs":[],"upgradeList":[{"key":"0.685c02bd78f9","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_200/h_200/50364/842288/2025/7/15/828380.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.bd842d24e1c78","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_200/h_200/50364/842288/2025/7/15/719880.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_200/h_200/50364/842288/2025/7/15/680025.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_200/h_200/50364/842288/2025/7/15/310459.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_200/h_200/50364/842288/2025/7/15/422048.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【生存的道路】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蜃都的一角，在阴暗的巷子里，刚下过雨的地面还很泥泞。这里有不少无家可归的流浪者，他们只能在垃圾堆的缝隙里席地而坐，有气无力地打量着路过的人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真对这样的景象习以为常，她快速地穿过熟悉的小巷，手中紧紧攥着一袋救济粮。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"像所有流浪者一样，她衣衫褴褛，身上没有任何口袋或容器能藏起她唯一的所有物，只能任凭它暴露在他人的视线下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"直到她接近自己平时休息的小窝时，才放缓了自己的脚步，稍稍松了口气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但就在这时，却突然有人抓住了她的脚踝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她下意识地攥紧了手中的救济粮，然后低下头，看向了自己的脚边。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那是一个身如枯槁的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也许是因为受伤，也许是因为饥饿失去了几乎全部的力气，他只能趴在那里，用仅有的力气抓住她的脚踝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那双干枯的眼睛死死地盯着她手中的食物。发白的嘴唇颤抖着，像是在拼尽最后一丝气力挤出几个字"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「求你……分我一点……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听见对方的祈求，水月真没有露出任何表情，她歪了歪头，仿佛不明白他为什么会提出这种要求。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「抱歉……这是我走了十六个街区才领到的，我也要活下去，不能给你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真语气平淡地说完，就看见对方的脸扭曲了起来，这种面孔对她来说很常见，那是嫉妒混杂着怨恨的表情。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在这种地方，拥有健康的体魄就像一种特权，水月真非常珍惜自己唯一的优势，她绝不会允许自己挨饿。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"饥饿是一种疾病，她知道，一旦放任它趁虚而入，那自己将永远也走不出这片泥潭。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"出于心底残存的一丝怜悯，水月真没有用力挣脱那只手只是静静等着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那人耗尽了力气，也没有得到自己想要的回应，最后一点生命的火光在他眼中熄灭，抓住她脚踝的手，也无力地垂落下去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真抬起头，打算继续向前走。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但她的背后，忽然响起另一个不怀好意的声音。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「她身上肯定藏了很多吃的!」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这一声喊叫，立刻引来了他人的注意，周围探出几个脑袋，都是和水月真差不多大的孩子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真停住了脚步，缓缓抬起另一只手，她还拿着一节水管。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她并不意外，这样的情形，隔几天总会撞上一次。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过，她对自己的力量很有自信，就算人数再翻倍，她也有胜利的把握。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一片沉默中，有几个少年认出了水月真。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在看清她手里只有一袋不多不少的食物之后，他们不甘心地缩了回去，几分钟后，再也没有人看向这里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真没有再回头看那地上饿死的尸体，径直回到了自己的小窝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽说是小窝，但其实也只是一片空地，唯一的特别之处就是有一片能遮雨的顶棚。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真抱膝坐在地上，尽管保住了明天的口粮，但她并没有什么喜悦之情。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"后天、大后天、之后的所有日子，都会这样吗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的心中一片空茫。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【胜利的道路】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"宽阔的竞技场内座无虚席，闪烁的氛围灯刺得水月真有些睁不开眼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她还是第一次站上这么豪华的擂台，但这里对她来说，和从前那些狭窄阴暗的地下搏击场也没有太大的区别。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"全力以赴，击倒对手，这就是她需要做的全部。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就在水月真打量着对手的同时，广播中忽然响起了主持人的声音。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在节目开始之前，容我插播一个令人惊喜的消息。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「为了让节目更有看点，有位不愿透露姓名的先生想要添一点彩头!」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「选手们，只要在擂台上站到最后，就能获得一份超级大礼!」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"随着主持人的介绍，有人将一个大箱子推到了擂台边。咔哒一声，箱子打开，聚光灯照射在上面，反射出一片冷硬的金属色。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那就是--脉冲动力外骨骼的最新型号!」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「裂星FS2200!」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听见这个名字，所有选手的呼吸都变得炽热起来，就连水月真，也忍不住看向了擂台边。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然主持人的语气故作神秘，但其实这份奖品的存在早就已经暗中传开了，所有来到这里的选手，几乎都是冲着它来的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这里的无限制格斗允许使用各种植入体和武器，然而这种高端的型号，常人难以触及，根本不可能在擂台上见到。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真低头看向自己手上老旧的拳套，这是她赖以谋生的老伙计。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"现在，拳套遮住了她的旧伤，没有人能看出来，她的左手已经不太灵便了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她或许可以在擂台上再赢一次、两次，但不可能永远赢下长"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在这里，受伤就像慢性的死亡--除非拥有能够代替肉体的力量。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"擂台边的裂星FS2200，可以说是一件昂贵的奖品，但对于水月真来说，更是一份足以令她脱胎换骨的希望。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真抬起头，对手顿时被她的眼神吓得后退了半步。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不知过去了多久，水月真也记不清自己究竟击败了多少人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"观众狂热的呐喊和主持人的嘶吼响彻全场，但这些声音都不如她自己心脏的鼓动来得强烈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"右边的拳套已经彻底破损了，但重要的是，现在只有她依然站在擂台上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的视线已经有些模糊，而眼角的余光里，却始终有一片金属色的光芒在闪动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"很多选手并非真的因为实力不济，而是败给了她敢于搏命的疯狂意志。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她原本就一无所有，当然也不怕押上一切。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"听见主持人宣布胜利的一瞬间，水月真再也坚持不住，脱力倒了下去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"再次醒来时，水月真第一时间就看见了放在床边的金属箱，她不顾身上插着的管线，翻身起来检查了一番，确认那是她的外骨骼之后才彻底放心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"直到这时，她才注意到，自己所处的房间看起来像是一间病房，而房间里还有另一个人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「水月真小姐，你好。你在擂台上的表现，真是令人印象深刻。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那个文职人员模样的女人微笑着向她打了个招呼，水月真静静地看着她，没有打算开口。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「先生很欣赏你，这副外骨骼只是一个见面礼。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「如果你愿意加入我们，未来还会有更多为你量身打造的新型号。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而你，只需要继续做你最擅长的事就可以了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"水月真摸了摸冰冷的金属外骨骼，坚硬扎实的质地，很像小时候她从不离身的水管，带给她无与伦比的安全感。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她毫不犹豫地点头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【候选人观察记录】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"致茶蘼女士:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"经过六个月的康复训练，水月真的力量基本恢复到巅峰水准，对她的观察也告一段落。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的过去极为简单，没有任何亲人，流浪到都，以参加地下拳赛谋生，可以确认没有任何疑点。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也许是因为过去习惯独处，她无法融入训练集体。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"除了必要的社交外，她不与任何人说话，即使身处安全的环境，也对周围的一切都充满警惕。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而且耐心较差，总是跳过交流的阶段，用动手来解决问题。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在这一点上，我与她沟通过数次，她同意改进，但短时间内恐怕看不到什么成果。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因此，完全不建议将她安排到需要团队合作的岗位上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在喜好方面，她只对两类事物表现出强烈的兴趣--食物和武器。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只要掌握这两点，与她沟通就会变得简单许多，而她在训练中的服从性也会变高。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以上的性格缺陷，在某些条件下也可以转化为优点。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因此，我认为她适合安排在必须保密、能够独立行动、需求武力的位置上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而这，正是鲁伯特先生的诉求。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只要运用得当，她会是一件强大的武器。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"执行秘书 墨缇卡"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.a07c8145a276c","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 驱散，禁疗手"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属暴击率，暴击伤害，暴击伤害 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 在pvp中有着足够的坦度以及高额的反击伤害，克制龙妈有一定效果"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.26084937cff0e","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血之躯+8金刚+6巨壁屏障"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13bc74514d1148","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"匠/灯塔"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/212350.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]

hot_content_strategies.name: 伊瑟！全角色！节奏榜！持续更新！
Re:从零开始的异格者生活（自建开荒入门攻略）
